bead.title: FEAT-001/FEAT-014: add 'ddx runs metrics' token/cost consolidation subcommand
bead.description:
PROBLEM
FEAT-014 consolidates the token/cost/usage surfaces under 'ddx runs metrics', and FEAT-001 routes metrics there, but the subcommand does not exist; usage data is only reachable via 'ddx bead metrics'. The documented consolidated metrics surface is unmet.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-001-cli.md:77-78 routes the token/cost/usage consolidation (FEAT-014) under 'ddx runs metrics'. No cli/cmd/runs*.go metrics subcommand exists (verified: no matches, 2026-06-19 audit). The underlying usage/cost data is already produced by the existing metrics store backing 'ddx bead metrics'.

PROPOSED FIX
Add a 'metrics' subcommand to the 'ddx runs' root command (created by the sibling 'ddx runs' namespace bead) in cli/cmd/. The subcommand reads token/cost/usage from the existing metrics store that backs 'ddx bead metrics' and presents the FEAT-014 consolidation. Reuse the existing metrics data access; do not add new persistence.

DEPENDENCY
Depends on the sibling bead that creates the 'ddx runs' root command; this bead only attaches the metrics subcommand to it.

NON-SCOPE
Do not remove or alter the existing 'ddx bead metrics'/'ddx exec'/'ddx log' surfaces — deprecation is tracked separately. Do not add new persistence; read only from existing metrics/executions/attachments stores. Do not implement 'ddx runs log/history' (sibling bead) or 'ddx tries' (sibling bead).
bead.acceptance:
1. 'ddx runs metrics --help' exits 0 and the subcommand is registered under the 'ddx runs' root per FEAT-001 §77-78.
2. 'ddx runs metrics' surfaces the token/cost/usage consolidation referenced by FEAT-001 §77-78 / FEAT-014, read from the existing metrics store backing 'ddx bead metrics' (no new persistence).
3. TestRunsCommandMetrics exercises the subcommand against a fixture repo via testutils.NewFixtureRepo(t, ...).
4. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... green.
5. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
